entity.summary: LightLink decentralized exchange protocol providing token swaps, concentrated-liquidity positions, liquidity pools, limit orders, TWAP execution, analytics, route selection, and advanced conditional trading features.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Elektrik as a LightLink DEX and documents swaps, limit orders, TWAPs, liquidity pools, analytics, route selection, concentrated-liquidity positions, and advanced order controls. HEI consolidates Elektrik V2 and product-guide representations under one exchange entity.

evidence.title: Welcome to Elektrik
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Elektrik as a decentralized exchange protocol integrated with LightLink and documents AMM trading together with iceberg, limit, stop-loss, and conditional order functionality.

evidence.title: Elektrik Exchange
evidence.notes: First-party exchange documentation describes non-fungible concentrated-liquidity positions, configurable price ranges, liquidity-pool participation, trading-fee earnings, and liquidity withdrawal flows.

evidence.title: Connect with Elektrik DEX
evidence.notes: First-party connection guide provides the Elektrik application swap URL and wallet/network connection workflow for the DEX.
